# Pacific Steel Scouting

The official 2026 performance intelligence and match scouting platform for FRC Team 5025 (Pacific Steel).

## Overview

Pacific Steel Scouting is a high-performance web application designed for elite FIRST Robotics Competition (FRC) data intelligence. It integrates real-time telemetry, pit mapping, match scouting, and strategic analysis tools.

## Key Features

- **Match Scouting**: Real-time data entry for autonomous, teleop, and endgame performance.
- **Pit Intelligence**: Comprehensive team tracking and visual pit mapping.
- **Strategy Hub**: Drive team command center with match history and tactical replays.
- **Alliance Selection**: Advanced data-driven pick list management.
- **Offline Sync**: Robust data caching for reliable performance in low-connectivity competition environments.

## Technical Stack

- **Frontend**: React, React Router 7, Tailwind CSS (v4), shadcn/ui.
- **Backend**: Convex (Real-time database and serverless functions).
- **Authentication**: Convex Auth / Auth.js.
- **Deployment**: Vercel.

## Important Links

- [Dashboard](https://pacificscouting.vercel.app/dashboard)
- [Match Scouting](https://pacificscouting.vercel.app/scouting)
- [Team List](https://pacificscouting.vercel.app/teams)
- [Help & Support](https://pacificscouting.vercel.app/help)
